name: Blue Collar Backers
overview: For many people, owning and operating their own business is the ultimate American dream. On average, more than 540,000 new businesses a month will launch in the United States, but what separates a good idea from one that just reads well on paper? Enter the experts who are offering not only a cash investment, but sweat equity to burgeoning businesses.

trailers.title: ‘Blue Collar Backers’ Cameron Davies advice to potential small business owners
Blue collar backer gets food trucks rolling
